---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or component for Fabrk
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

Describe the problem or pain point this feature would address.

**Example:** "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a specific use case where this feature would be valuable.

**Example:**
- As a developer building a SaaS dashboard...
- When creating admin panels, I need to...
- For my client projects, it would be helpful to...

## Component Type (if applicable)

- [ ] UI Component (Button, Input, etc.)
- [ ] Landing Page Section
- [ ] Dashboard Component
- [ ] Email Template
- [ ] Documentation/Guide
- [ ] Tool/Script
- [ ] Other: _______

## Mockup or Reference

If possible, provide a mockup, sketch, or link to a similar implementation.

**Links:**
- Reference implementation: [URL]
- Design inspiration: [URL]
- Documentation: [URL]

## Acceptance Criteria

What would make this feature "done"? List specific requirements.

- [ ] Component is fully typed (TypeScript)
- [ ] Component is mobile responsive
- [ ] Component follows neobrutalism design system
- [ ] Documentation is included
- [ ] Example usage is provided
- [ ] Other: _______

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide more detailed specs
- [ ] I'm just suggesting an idea

---

**Checklist before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and solution
- [ ] I have provided use cases and context
- [ ] I have considered how this fits with Fabrk's "anti-bloat" philosophy
